step.title: Scan lifecycle phases
step.action: Scan all lifecycle phases for workflow execution state.
Identify which phases have active, completed, or pending workflows.

step.title: Collect progress indicators
step.action: Collect progress indicators: completed workflows, pending gates, open items.
If sprint-plan exists, load it for sprint context and velocity data.

step.title: Identify blockers and risks
step.action: Identify blockers, risks, and unresolved dependencies.
Flag any failed gates or stalled workflows.

step.title: Calculate health metrics
step.action: Calculate health metrics: velocity, completion rate, blocker count.
Compare against targets if sprint-plan is available.

step.title: Determine next actions
step.action: Determine recommended next actions based on current state.
Prioritize actions that unblock the most downstream work.

step.title: Produce status report
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md, filling all sections with current project status.
